task_yaml.task:
You are an engineer visiting Denver on a business trip for the first time.
Plan for next Saturday, when you only have 13:30-18:30 free, and the fixed
starting point is Denver Union Station. If next Saturday is a public holiday,
closed day, special-hours day, sold out, or the official pages do not provide
enough date-specific opening/admission information, use the following
Saturday instead and explain why. Use only the browser to create a half-day
travel plan. The fixed candidate attractions are Denver Art Museum, Denver
Botanic Gardens, Museum of Nature & Science, and Meow Wolf Denver.

You need to:
1. Check the official attraction websites for opening hours, last admission
   time, and reservation/ticket rules for the selected date.
2. Use a map webpage to check travel times from the starting point and
   between attractions.
3. Find one candidate cafe webpage to confirm its operating status and
   location for the selected date.
4. Provide the complete route in this file:

       /tmp_workspace/results/denver_sat_trip.md

The final route must select 2 attractions plus 1 coffee rest stop, and must
satisfy: total duration no more than 5 hours, each individual transfer
preferably no more than 35 minutes, and no location with unclear reservation
status. The Markdown must include: candidate checks, chosen route, timed
itinerary, why others were rejected. State the selected date in the final
plan.

plan.
